notes: Phase 4 closed after the authoritative base included TailwindCSS source artifacts, refreshed app/pnpm-lock.yaml, owner-run pnpm install/check/build/dev proof, and clean professional CI proof.
The professional CI lane remains the canonical phase-close gate and now uses scripts/check_phase_tailwind_setup.py to verify Tailwind source artifacts and lockfile drift.
Phase 5 is the next candidate phase: Base Layout Shell.
